blockers.evidence: cosign verify against the immutable upstream index returned no signatures found
release tag 4.39 resolves to an unsigned upstream source commit
the upstream container release workflow disables provenance and has no attestation step

controls.evidence: ADR-0020 accepts the exact upstream commit, tree, archive checksum, and immutable Dockerfile frontend for the bounded local lab
the exact digest passed the vulnerability gate before keyless signing bound it to the recorded issuer, identity, and workflow SHA
Cosign verification returned transparency-log-backed entries hashed in artifact 8320799708
Cosign and GitHub attestation verification bind the artifact to workflow SHA 2ff065f3ee9fe53edc4bc6c21daf855eaac8c04b
the non-root scratch image ran weed mini with writable /tmp for its default local sockets and cache

assessment.rationale: The hardened Shirokuma source build pins every build input, provides writable weed mini temporary storage, completes Critical=0/High=0 scanning before signing and provenance publication, and binds signature, transparency, SLSA, SBOM, scanner freshness, and generated evidence hashes to the exact digest. The upstream image remains blocked.

requirements: pin the admitted exact digest in the resident-image ledger and Flux resources
verify Flux reconciliation and functional S3 smoke on mac-studio-solo
record SSD impact and backup/export behavior
retain teardown and rebuild evidence for parent Issue #26
